cluster_name: Greater Lincolnshire Combined County Authority Innovation Ecosystem
strap: Greater Lincolnshire Combined County Authority's innovation footprint draws £2.29bn of UKRI lead-led funding across 2,010 grants spanning 2 active clusters, with Greater Lincolnshire Energy (54%) the largest single cluster and Nottingham (31%) the dominant regional anchor by UKRI £. 33 Companies House-traced spin-outs region-wide translate to £69m UKRI per spin-out.
behaviour: The region shows medium-confidence "Coordination–Activity" stabilisation stacks at ecosystem grain — multi-actor coordination distributes risk across institutional partners without forcing the strategic option-collapse that would convert capability into a defined pathway.
